diffCoverage.notes: Verified the ui unit only crosses into the core through command/ via invoke/listen, per ADR-0003.

findings.evidence: All changes are in the SvelteKit ui unit (src/). It depends on the Rust core only through Tauri invoke()/listen() against command/ (login_from_file, start_listening_from_file, send_message, cred_file_summary; zalo://message). No direct reference to zalo/session/store internals, consistent with ADR-0003 (ui is a separate unit talking to command/).
findings.fix: Keep IPC the only ui->core channel; introduce a thin client module if the invoke surface grows.

summary: Frontend-only change confined to the ui unit (src/). The new session store + components reach the Rust core exclusively through the command/ IPC boundary and the zalo://message event, preserving the ADR-0003 separation. No Rust layers touched. Approve.
